title: MikroTik Cloud Core Router, CCR2004-16G-2S+PC
description: CCR2004-16G-2S+PC is a desktop or rackmount router up to 19" rack from the new line of CCR routers, which comes with passive cooling and the highest ratio power per 1 core of all CCRs, which is the most important aspect for more demanding per-connection-based processing operations (eg. QoS). The router is powered by a CPU with a 64bit ARM architecture with a clock speed of 1200 MHz, has 4GB of DDR4 RAM and 128MB of NAND storage The router has 16Ã Gigabit LAN , 2Ã SFP+ slot (possibility to connect 1G and 10G modules) and serial port type RJ45. On the back, it has a sufficiently oversized passive heatsink and two DC inputs with an input voltage of 36 to 57 V DC - terminal block and connector Powerful desktop/rackmount device with ARM 64bit architecture CPU 1200 MHz, 4 cores, 4GB RAM, 128MB NAND Two DC inputs - connector and terminal block Passive cooling Interface: (16) Gigabit, (2) SFP/SFP+ Pre-installed RouterOS L6 Device Ears up to 19" rack 48 V/ 0.95 A power adapter
